memoryArtifacts.headline: Henry Chamberlain Sr.
memoryArtifacts.description:
Henry Chamberlain Sr, came from Hingham Co. of Norfolk, England in the ship diligent, arrived August 10, 1638, settled in Hingham, Mass with his wife Jane and Mother, Christian.

zh.lifeSummary: Henry Chamberlin Sr於1595年出生在英國諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆。他於1609年10月15日與Joane Bradshaw在英國斯塔福爾沃特爾法爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1674年7月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可赫爾享年79歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可赫爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry Chamberlin Sr于1595年出生在英国諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆。他于1609年10月15日与Joane Bradshaw在英国斯塔福爾沃特爾法爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1674年7月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可赫爾享年79岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可赫爾。

nameMeanings.name: Chamberlin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: occupational name for an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, from Old French chamberlenc ‘chamberlain’. See also Chamberlain and compare above.

variants.name: Chamberlain
meanings: English: status name from Old French chambrelain, Norman French cambrelanc, cambrelen(c) ‘chamberlain’ (of ancient Germanic origin, from kamer ‘chamber, room’, Latin camera (see Chambers ) + the diminutive suffix -(l)ing). This was originally the name of an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, but is so widespread in late medieval England that it must sometimes have been used of people of more ordinary status, perhaps as a nickname for an officious or self-important person or for someone who played the role of chamberlain in a folk play, tableau, or ceremony. Compare Chancellor for a possible similar usage.

variants.name: Chamberland
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Camille, Marcel, Normand, Adrien, Andre, Antoine, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Fernande, Ghislaine.
French: variant of   Chamberlin  , a cognate of English   Chamberlain  .
History: Simon Chamberland from Chantonnay in Vendée, France, married Marie Boileau in Sainte-Famille, Île d'Orléans, QC, in 1669.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Henry Chamberlin Sr was born in 1595, in Wymondham, Norfolk, England. He married Joane Bradshaw on 15 October 1609, in Waterfall, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 July 1674, in Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 79, and was buried in Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry Chamberlin Sr est né en 1595, à Wymondham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Il a épousé Joane Bradshaw le 15 octobre 1609, à Waterfall, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1674, à Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Henry Chamberlin Sr wurde 1595 in Wymondham, Norfolk, England geboren. Er hat am 15. Oktober 1609 in Waterfall, Staffordshire, England Joane Bradshaw geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Juli 1674 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Henry Chamberlin Sr è nato il nel 1595 nel Wymondham, Norfolk, England. Lui sposato Joane Bradshaw il 15 ottobre 1609, nel Waterfall, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 luglio 1674, nel Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Chamberlin Srは1595年にイギリスノーフォルクウイモンドハムで生まれた。1609年10月15日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアワテルファルでJoane Bradshawと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1674年7月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクハルで79歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクハルにて埋葬された。

ko.Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 뉴포트
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Chamberlin Sr(은)는 1595년 영국 노르폴크 윈이몽함에서 태어났다. 그는 1609년 10월 15일 영국 스태퍼드실르 왓르팰에서 Joane Bradshaw(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1674년 7월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 훌에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 훌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry Chamberlin Sr nasceu em 1595, em Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Joane Bradshaw em 15 de outubro de 1609, em Waterfall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de julho de 1674, em Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry Chamberlin Sr родился в 1595 г. в местности вимондхам, норфолк, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Bradshaw 15 октября 1609 г. в местности вэитирфалл, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 июля 1674 г. в местности хулл, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности хулл, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Henry Chamberlin Sr nació en 1595, en Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Se casó con Joane Bradshaw el 15 de octubre de 1609, en Waterfall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de julio de 1674, en Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Hull, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
